ab: Maha nami theyaq nganguc yami ka bubu mu ali saya.
ch: 今天我和媽媽要出去玩。
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: Mblawa ka karac diyan, ini ktilux ma ini ksekuy, tleetu ka bgihur.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: Mekan nami ppuqun bobo dupi, so sapo ka ledax hido cmebu hei nami, muuxun bale.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: Bbiyan de mgtanah ka karac di.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: Smiling ku bubu mu, malux mgtanah ka karac.
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: Mesa cmiyuk ka bubu mu, “Yaani psbgihur paru.”
ch: 媽媽說:「可能是颱風要來了。」
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: Uka plabu keeman ka karac baro, pkriyak ka pngerah di.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: Maha nami sapah ka yami duri di.
Moda nami eluw ssaan sapah, drunun mu pngerah ka sntangan mu.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: Naka ini eyah ka bgihur paru, mkmosa ku theyaq nganguc dungan.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
